# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0  # Replace with the desired AMI ID
      InstanceType: t2.micro        # Choose an appropriate instance type
      KeyName: MyKeyPair              # Replace with your key pair name
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y httpd
          service httpd start
          chkconfig httpd on
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp2
